description: Rainscope Filmworks is a creative production studio based in Vancouver, BC. We produce cinematic narrative films, high-end commercial campaigns, and corporate branding stories.
heroTitle: A Creative Production Company Shaped by the Pacific Northwest
intro: Rainscope Filmworks is a Vancouver-based production studio specializing in cinematic narrative films, high-end commercial campaigns, and corporate video retainers. We pair Pacific Northwest storytelling with full-service production, and share gear and live AV capabilities through our Rentals and Live divisions when projects need them.
sectionCommercialIntro: Selected brand films, spec campaigns, and corporate contracts — each built for the platform it lives on.
sectionFilmsIntro: Independent and collaborative narrative work — short films, festival projects, and long-form storytelling from our Vancouver team.
sectionTeamIntro: Directors, producers, and cinematographers who bring texture, depth, and narrative gravity to every frame.
title: Rainscope Filmworks | Cinematic & Narrative Production

description: Rainscope is a creative production company based in the Pacific Northwest, specializing in narrative films, high-end commercial campaigns, gear rentals, and live event AV production.

description: Full-service audio visual production in Vancouver, BC. Camera switching, live sound, vision, lighting, and webcasting for corporate events and live performances.
heroTitle: Audio Visual Production for Vancouver Events
intro: Your event deserves more than a microphone and a projector. Rainscope Live is a full AV team — camera switching, live sound, projection, and show calling for everyone in the room. From corporate keynotes to live performances, we bring broadcast-level production to your venue. Need remote attendees? We can webcast with the same crew and standards.
showcaseDescription: A look at events we've produced across Vancouver — corporate gatherings, performances, and more.
title: Rainscope Live | Audio Visual Production in Vancouver, BC
